---
title: "clustering-noise"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r}
library(mvtnorm)
library(scatterplot3d)
library(cluster)
library(kernlab)
library(dbscan)

set.seed(865)

source("functions.R")
source("noise.R")
```

# Non-convex data with consistent cluster size

```{r}
# non-convex data in the shape of a triple helix with three non-overlapping 
# clusters and consistent cluster size
scatterplot3d(X3,color=trueX3,pch=19)
```
```{r}
out <- run_methods(X3, trueX3, k = 3)
out$results
```


```{r}
# non-convex data of a saddle and spring forming two overlapping clusters
# with consistent cluster size, n=500
scatterplot3d(X4,pch=19,color=trueX4)
```
```{r}
out <- run_methods(X4, trueX4, k = 2,
                   hdb_minPts = 10)
out$results
```

# Convex data with inconsistent cluster size

```{r}
# convex data with two non-overlapping clusters and inconsistent cluster size
scatterplot3d(Xi2,color=trueXi2,pch=19)
```
```{r}
out <- run_methods(Xi2, trueXi2, k = 2,
                   db_eps =  0.5)
out$results
```

```{r}
# convex data with two overlapping clusters and inconsistent cluster size
scatterplot3d(X2i,color=trueX2i,pch=19)
```
```{r}
out <- run_methods(X2i, trueX2i, k = 2,
                   db_eps = 0.5)
out$results
```


# Non-convex data with inconsistent cluster size

```{r}
# non-convex data of a saddle and spring forming overlapping clusters with
# inconsistent cluster size
scatterplot3d(X4i,pch=19,color=trueX4i)
```
```{r}
out <- run_methods(X4i, trueX4i, k = 2,
                   db_eps = 0.5,
                   hdb_minPts = 10)
out$results
```
